oddities.note: Document excerpt contains only definitional provisions (subsections 3-7 of a section); no new organizational entities, offices, or named documents appear in this passage. Primary content establishes technical definitions for 'covered foreign entity', 'covered sectors', 'party', and 'United States person' with multiple categories and cross-references to regulatory authority.
